summary: A Go-based CLI tool that integrates with MCP for infrastructure validation, featuring Goss migration, baseline detection, and a dashboard reporter.
concerns: 6 untracked files in git status indicating incomplete commits
Heavy reliance on auto-commits for session metadata
Test specs split across non-standard directories (.goralph/specs, ClaudeDesktop/specs)
Potential over-automation of chore tasks in commit history
suggestions: Consolidate test specifications into a single standard location
Address untracked files and establish stricter commit hygiene
Review auto-commit automation to reduce noisy commit history
Add documentation for the MCP handler endpoints
